name: Twingate
description: Monitor Twingate zero-trust network access: user access, device trust, groups, remote networks, and security policies

credentialFields.label: Twingate Network Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Twingate network subdomain. If your URL is https://mycompany.twingate.com, enter 'mycompany'.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an API key in the Twingate Admin Console: Settings > API > Generate Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Twingate users and their access status. Flags disabled or inactive accounts that still exist.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Twingate groups are configured with proper access controls. Lists group types, active status, and member counts.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks device trust status and active state across all Twingate devices.

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all Twingate remote networks with connector and resource counts for infrastructure inventory evidence.
